perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a beige flat cap, glasses, and a white T-shirt stands in front of a glass-walled store, pointing and gesturing enthusiastically at the camera. (2) The scene cuts to the interior of a brightly lit, modern retail space with wooden display tables featuring drones and handheld gimbals. (3) The camera focuses on a robot vacuum cleaner with a transparent outer casing, showing its internal components and a dust bag. (4) The scene shifts to a wooden shelf displaying several sets of white and black tea cups next to a glass teapot with a wooden handle. (5) The final segment shows a wall display of framed T-shirts with various graphic designs and text.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-tempo electronic background music starts. A high-pitched, energetic male voice begins speaking immediately with an excited tone. (2) The music continues at a consistent volume as the male voice describes the features of a robot vacuum cleaner, including its suction power and quiet operation. (3) As the visuals change to a tea set and then T-shirts, the speaker's tone remains lively and informative. Ambient store noise is minimal, muffled by the music and clear vocals. (4) The music ends abruptly with the speaker's final sentence.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '3c有意思tim哥' and '@3ctim' appear in the top-left corner as social media handles. (2) Hook Text: '你猜得到嗎？台灣買不到的東西' (Can you guess? Things you can't buy in Taiwan) appears in large, bold font with a yellow and green highlight. (3) Functional Text: 'DJI ROMO 系列' (DJI ROMO Series) and '感覺很厲害' (Feels very powerful) appear as captions. (4) Decorative Text: '25000pa的吸力' (25000pa suction) and '零毛髮纏繞' (Zero hair tangling) appear with green checkmarks. (5) Functional Text: '戶外式 便攜式茶具組' (Outdoor portable tea set) appears at the bottom. (6) Decorative Text: '賣完就沒了！' (Sold out and it's gone!) appears at the end.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at storefront -> Product demonstration inside -> Showcase of lifestyle items

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 2 male staff members in the background, 1 female customer in the distance
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Middle-aged man wearing a beige flat cap, glasses, a white T-shirt with a 'HUMAN MADE' graphic, and a yellow smartwatch.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Modern retail interior with light wood display stands, minimalist glass cases, and large windows looking out to a city street.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to introduce unique, non-tech lifestyle products found at the DJI Visitor Center in Shenzhen that are unavailable in Taiwan, serving as a 'shopping guide' or 'discovery' vlog for fans of the brand.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct recommendation of the location and products within the store.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Main creator's distinctive beige cap and fast-paced 'Let me tell you' opening style.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets tech-savvy viewers interested in 'lifestyle' extensions of famous tech brands.
